name: PayPal
description: Connect agents to PayPal for invoices, orders, payments, disputes, subscriptions, and catalog management via the official PayPal MCP server

fields.label: PayPal Access Token
fields.description: OAuth2 access token generated from your PayPal client ID and secret

sandbox.description: Use PayPal sandbox environment for testing (set to false for production)

tools.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups or 'all' to enable all tools
